race.comment: MARINES CRY (2) looks the one to run down. In great form winning last two and off the inside draw and with Rocky's claim will take catching. SUPPORTIVE (6) is a veteran mare resuming but will be suited by the good early pace. Has a solid record fresh and will be winding up strongly. ON JUST TERMS (4) resumes and best figures measure right up. Tricky draw to overcome but has good early speed and expected to push forward and give a sight. TOP FUN (11) is fitter for two runs back and should be ready to fire. This is easier and should be in this for a long way. FAVAIOS (5) rates highly on win two back and certainly worth another chance.
